## 📝 What

One-paragraph summary of what this PR does.

## 🎯 Why

The motivation and context. Link the issue(s) if there is one.

## 🛠️ How

Brief description of the approach. Highlight non-obvious choices or architectural decisions.

## 🎯 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking new functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (impacts existing behavior)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (docs, README, comments)
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🛠️ Infrastructure/DevOps/CI-CD

---

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm -w lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm -w typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm -w test`)
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Integration tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-tenant isolation tests added (if tenant-scoped)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Documentation & Security
- [ ] docs/ updated (if architectural change)
- [ ] docs/17-DECISIONS_LOG.md updated (if design decision made)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if new env vars added)
- [ ] No secrets committed (API keys, tokens, credentials)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or sensitive data

### Accessibility & Performance
- [ ] Accessibility features added (if UI change)
- [ ] No performance degradation
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI change)
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (if UI change)

---
